# Copilot CLI allowlist guidance (`home-ops`)

Use these as pre-approvable commands **only when** `KUBECONFIG` points to the scoped read-only config generated by `scripts/generate-copilot-kubeconfig.sh`.

## Allowlist (safe/read-only)

- Kubernetes discovery and inspection:
    - `kubectl get ...`
    - `kubectl describe ...`
    - `kubectl logs ...`
    - `kubectl top ...`
    - `kubectl explain ...`
    - `kubectl api-resources`
    - `kubectl api-versions`
    - `kubectl version`
    - `kubectl config view --minify`
- Flux read-only:
    - `flux get ...`
    - `flux tree ...`
    - `flux stats`
    - `flux check`
    - `flux diff ...`
    - `flux trace ...`
- Local GitOps rendering/analysis:
    - `flux-local test ...`
    - `flux-local diff ...`
    - `flux-local build ...`
    - `kustomize build ...`
    - `kubeconform ...`
    - `helm template ...`
    - `helm show ...`
    - `yq ...`
    - `jq ...`
    - read-only git/file tools: `git status`, `git diff`, `git show`, `git log`, `rg`, `grep`, `find`

## Require approval / denylist

- Any mutating kubectl verb/subcommand:
    - `apply`, `delete`, `edit`, `patch`, `replace`, `create`, `scale`, `rollout`, `drain`, `cordon`, `uncordon`, `label`, `annotate`
    - `cp`, `exec`, `port-forward`, `proxy`, `debug`, `attach`
- Any mutating Flux action:
    - `flux reconcile`, `flux suspend`, `flux resume`, `flux create`, `flux delete`
- Any mutating Helm action:
    - `helm install`, `helm upgrade`, `helm uninstall`, `helm rollback`
- Network/egress or remote-access tools:
    - `curl`, `wget`, `nc`, `ssh`, `scp`
- Any command writing outside the repo working tree.
